overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of Batman walking across a rain-soaked gothic bridge at night. The character traverses the bridge sidewalk passing under stone towers with the illuminated Gotham City skyline visible through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked bridge sidewalk with industrial stone wall

agents.ego_description: Batman walking steadily along the bridge sidewalk toward the distant tower arch

entered.detail: tall weathered stone wall with small windows running along the right side of the bridge
massive gothic stone tower with archway forming the bridge support structure ahead
ornate black lampposts casting warm light on the wet pavement
tall pointed cathedral spire visible through the fog in the distance
metal safety railing along the edge of the bridge sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Batman walks along a rain-soaked bridge sidewalk flanked by an industrial stone wall on the right and a metal railing. Street lamps illuminate the wet pavement as the character approaches a massive gothic bridge tower in the distance, with fog obscuring the city beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge tower archway with pedestrian crossing

events.description: passes under the bridge tower arch, temporarily sheltered from the rain
pedestrian with umbrella walks past in the opposite direction
vehicle with headlights appears in the distance on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: Batman continues walking under the bridge tower, passing a pedestrian and observing approaching traffic

notable_agents.action: walking with a black umbrella in the opposite direction, passing Batman on the sidewalk

entered.detail: illuminated gothic cathedral spires and buildings emerging from the fog beyond the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character passes under the massive stone bridge tower arch, briefly sheltered from the rain. A pedestrian with an umbrella walks past in the opposite direction, and the illuminated gothic city skyline becomes visible through the fog ahead. A vehicle with headlights approaches in the distance on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bridge with panoramic gothic city skyline view

events.description: exits the bridge tower shadow and the gothic city skyline becomes fully visible on the right
character slows slightly and turns to observe the illuminated city skyline

agents.ego_description: Batman walking along the bridge while observing the illuminated gothic city skyline to the right

entered.detail: additional stone towers visible in the far distance marking the end of the bridge

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the tower, the scene opens to a panoramic view of the gothic city skyline illuminated against the night sky. Batman continues walking along the bridge railing, observing the fog-shrouded cathedral spires and buildings while street lamps cast reflections on the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked bridge that transitions from a confined industrial walkway into a panoramic vista of a gothic metropolis. It begins with Batman walking beside a stone wall and metal railing under the glow of street lamps, moving steadily toward a massive gothic bridge tower shrouded in fog. As the character passes under the shelter of the tower's arch, a pedestrian with an umbrella crosses his path and the distant headlights of a vehicle emerge through the mist. The scene then opens up as the camera emerges from beneath the stone structure, revealing the illuminated city skyline and fog-shrouded cathedral spires. Finally, the view expands to a wide perspective of the night sky and towering buildings while the character continues along the railing over the reflective, wet pavement.
